title: Mortgage Principal

statuteRef.label: Time limit for principal money secured by mortgage

questions.label: Date principal became due
questions.helpText: Usually the redemption/default date from which the mortgagee's claim to principal is actionable.

questions.label: Was there a written, signed acknowledgment of the mortgage debt?
questions.helpText: Acknowledgment can restart the running period for principal claims.

questions.label: Date of acknowledgment
questions.helpText: Date of the most relevant written acknowledgment.

questions.label: Was there a part payment toward principal?
questions.helpText: Part payment can restart the running period for principal claims.

questions.label: Date of part payment
questions.helpText: Date of the most relevant part payment.

notes: Mortgage claims frequently involve separate treatment for principal, interest, and possession relief.
If interest-only arrears are in issue, use the separate Mortgage Interest option.
